record.field:
# Get the first available POS config pos_config = env['pos.config'].search([], limit=1)
if pos_config: # Assign to selected orders or all orders without POS if records: # Update selected orders orders_to_update = records.filtered(lambda r: not r.pos_config_id) orders_to_update.write({'pos_config_id': pos_config.id}) raise UserError(f"✅ Assigned '{pos_config.name}' to {len(orders_to_update)} orders!") else: # Update all orders without POS all_orders = env['sale.order'].search([('pos_config_id', '=', False)]) all_orders.write({'pos_config_id': pos_config.id}) raise UserError(f"✅ Assigned '{pos_config.name}' to {len(all_orders)} orders!") else: raise UserError("❌ No POS configuration found. Please create a POS config first.")
